title: hieracium subcaesium subsp. pseudoligocephalum
intro: Hieracium subcaesium subsp. pseudoligocephalum is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium subcaesium plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium subcaesium subsp. pseudoligocephalum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
